ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or standard for the sizes (e.g., UK, EU, US) */,
  "xs" TEXT /* Extra Small size */,
  "xs_1" TEXT /* Extra Small size variant */,
  "s" TEXT /* Small size */,
  "s_1" TEXT /* Small size variant */,
  "m" TEXT /* Medium size */,
  "m_1" TEXT /* Medium size variant */,
  "l" TEXT /* Large size */,
  "xl" TEXT /* Extra Large size */,
  "xl_1" TEXT /* Extra Large size variant */,
  "xxl" TEXT /* Double Extra Large size */,
  "xxl_1" TEXT /* Double Extra Large size variant */,
  "xxxl" TEXT /* Triple Extra Large size */,
  "xxxl_1" TEXT /* Triple Extra Large size variant */,
  "petite" TEXT /* Petite size */,
  "tall" TEXT /* Tall size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size entry */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement */,
  "shoulders" TEXT /* Shoulders measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height */,
  "shoulders" TEXT /* Shoulders measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Neck measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was saved */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchased product */,
  "size_purchased" TEXT /* Size of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the purchase */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the purchase was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the purchase status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "available_sizes" TEXT /* Sizes available for the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the size recommendation (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Available size for the product */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement for the size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement for the size */,
  "shoulders" TEXT /* Shoulders measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement for the size */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Neck measurement for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "source_region" TEXT /* Region of the source size */,
  "target_region" TEXT /* Region of the target size */,
  "source_size" TEXT /* Size in the source region */,
  "target_size" TEXT /* Equivalent size in the target region */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the size conversion (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the conversion was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the conversion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewed product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the customer */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the fit of the product (1 to 5) */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the quality of the product (1 to 5) */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the value for money of the product (1 to 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the product image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category mapping */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_mapping_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)
